title: Ridgeline Turnpike: Bounded-Space Gantry Staffing
strategies: next-fit staffing: keep one gantry open, fill it until an arriving platoon doesn't fit, close it and open the next -- single open gantry, trivially bounded-space (reproduces the evaluator's weak baseline)

bounded first-fit: keep up to K gantries open, route each platoon to the lowest-id open gantry with room, and when all K are open evict the oldest (FIFO) to open a fresh one -- reuses gaps next-fit discards

bounded best-fit with capacity-aware eviction: route to the tightest-fitting open gantry, keep roomy gantries free for large platoons, and when forced to open a new gantry evict the fullest (least-useful) open one

seeded online local search / lookahead within the K-open window: score candidate gantries by remaining room and near-future arrivals, defer closing gantries that big incoming platoons will need, and restart-and-reoptimize the eviction policy
